description: Reference orchestration pattern: Research → Synthesis → Implementation → Verification. Based on production patterns observed in Claude Code's coordinator mode.

states.content: Phase 1: Research. Dispatching parallel research agents to investigate auth patterns and security requirements.
Scanning codebase for existing auth patterns. Found: OAuth2 in /src/auth/oauth.py:45, JWT validation in /src/middleware/auth.py:12, session handling in /src/auth/sessions.py:78.
Reviewing security requirements from docs/security-policy.md. Requirements: MFA mandatory for admin, session timeout 30min, OWASP Top 10 compliance, SOC2 audit trail.
Analyzing dependency landscape. Current: PyJWT 2.8.0, passlib 1.7.4. Recommended upgrade: PyJWT 2.9.0 (fixes CVE-2026-1234). No breaking changes.

Phase 2: Synthesis. Merging research findings. Approach: Unify on OAuth2+JWT (existing pattern in 3 files). Add MFA via TOTP. Upgrade PyJWT to 2.9.0. Files to modify: /src/auth/oauth.py:45, /src/middleware/auth.py:12, /src/auth/sessions.py:78. New file: /src/auth/mfa.py.

Phase 3: Implementation. Updated /src/auth/oauth.py - added MFA challenge step. Updated /src/middleware/auth.py - JWT validation now checks MFA claim. Created /src/auth/mfa.py - TOTP generation and verification. Updated /src/auth/sessions.py - 30min timeout enforced.

Phase 4: Verification. Running test suite: 24/24 auth tests pass. MFA flow verified end-to-end. Session timeout confirmed at 30min. OWASP checklist: 10/10 items addressed. PyJWT 2.9.0 CVE patch confirmed. No regressions detected.
All 4 phases complete. Auth refactor delivered: OAuth2+JWT+MFA, OWASP compliant, 24 tests passing, no regressions.

coordination_messages.content: Research existing auth patterns in codebase
Found OAuth2, JWT, sessions in 3 files
4 security requirements: MFA, timeout, OWASP, SOC2
PyJWT upgrade recommended for CVE fix
Verify auth implementation meets all requirements
